description: Ed25519 signature test vectors for Tatastu Proof. The signing public key is from the service's transparency log.
canonicalReceiptFormat: JSON with fixed key order: {"contentHash":...,"creatorId":...,"proofId":...,"signedAt":...,"signingKeyId":...,"version":...} — byte-match of the service's canonicalizeReceipt()
note: To verify a signature from a real stamp: import the SPKI public key, base64-decode the 'signature' field, UTF-8 encode the canonical receipt JSON, then call crypto.subtle.verify.

verificationAlgorithm.signatureDecoding: base64url decode the 'signature' field from the ProofReceipt
verificationAlgorithm.messageEncoding: UTF-8 encode the canonical receipt string

liveVerification: Fetch a real proof bundle from GET https://proof.tatastu.dev/proof/{id}/bundle — it includes signingPublicKey and signature. Pass to verifyOffline() in verify/offline.ts.
